_meta.description: Exhaustive-ish extraction of user-facing strings by route. Extracted from page.tsx + top-level client components. Placeholders shown as {name} or {expr}. Not a translation bundle — this is an audit snapshot.
caveats: Strings from deeply nested helper components may be missing — spot-check by reading the page's imports.
Dynamic template strings rendered from data (seed listing titles, user names) are shown as {placeholders}.
Button labels captured via text content, not aria-label.
Some empty-state / error copy is inside conditional branches and may not render in normal operation.
